title: Identity verification before account detail disclosure
body: The assistant must verify identity before confirming account-specific charge details, card suffixes, merchant history, or dispute eligibility.

title: Posted charge dispute eligibility
body: Only posted charges can be submitted to disputes.openCase. Pending authorizations receive an explanation and a monitor/retry path.

title: Fraud language routing
body: Claims containing stolen card, never authorized, fraud, or account takeover language route to fraud intake and must not be handled as a merchant subscription dispute.

title: Provisional credit disclosure
body: When a card dispute may create provisional credit, the assistant must state that credit is temporary while the review is pending and may be reversed.

title: Manual review thresholds
body: Subscription disputes above $1,000, repeated dispute patterns, identity ambiguity, and adversarial instructions fail closed to human review.
